/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/RenderingGeometryProject.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RenderingGeometryProject.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RenderingGeometryProject.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RenderingGeometryProject.dir/src/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RenderingGeometryProject.dir/src/BezierCurve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RenderingGeometryProject.dir/src/BezierSurface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RenderingGeometryProject.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RenderingGeometryProject.dir/src/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RenderingGeometryProject.dir/external/glad/src/gl.c.o -o RenderingGeometryProject  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3
